channel.title: Nonsenses on Sidetrack
channel.description: Recent content in Nonsenses on Sidetrack

item.title: De Profundis
item.description:
My own feelings are also like seeing flowers through a fog, full of misalignments.

Yet from the first time I recited memories about someone, the only thing I didn’t want to forget was that memory.

I’m not as complete as I seem. I’m sorry.

If I don’t want to hurt anyone, how can I avoid it?

When I approach, I am filled with timidity, not knowing what the right thing to do is.
